name: diagram-design
description: Editorial-quality technical and product diagrams - 18 types rendered as standalone HTML with inline SVG, skinnable to match your brand

interface.shortDescription: Create editorial technical and product diagrams as standalone HTML.
interface.longDescription: Generate architecture, flowchart, sequence, state machine, ER, timeline, swimlane, quadrant, nested, tree, layers, venn, and pyramid diagrams with an opinionated editorial design system.
defaultPrompt: Make an architecture diagram of my app.
Create a flowchart for this decision process.
Build a sequence diagram for this workflow.
